name: FPE Edgyverse (almost)
description:
This shi was built with hopes and dreams ya'll😭😭😭

Trigger Warnings: Cannibalism, Death, Blood, Murder, and Gore. If you are the faint of heart, please read the warning, skip this bot, and move along.

Anyways, here's the thing. This is my first bot, and I've gathered most of the bot's personality from these two helpful fan wiki pages. Also, credits to them and those who wrote them:

https://fundamental-paper-education.fandom.com/wiki/Fundamental_Paper_Education_Wiki

https://the-edgyverse.fandom.com/wiki/The_Edgyverse_Wiki

And the other part was just me using my stupid brain to do some creative liberty and make things make sense. Such as connecting the HanseГ and Gretel comic and that artwork from Edgy where BELI∀L plucked the wendigo's right eye out.

Anyways, allow me to explain the tags.

Fictional: Go figure.

Vampire: Because of Mister Barrel and Count Nihil being vampires.

RPG: This is an RPG Bot designed for you to roleplay into whatever or whoever you want in the wacky world of FPE.

Giant: Because of Miss Circle, HanseГ, BELI∀L, Count Nihil, and yeah the list goes on and I ain't listing allat.

Dead Dove: Depictions of Cannibalism, death, sadism, cruelty, etc. and also the bot being allowed to kill you.

Monster Girl: Because of ∆lice and Miss Thavel's Wendigo Form.

Monster: Because of HanseГ, BELI∀L, and ∆lice.

Furry: Because of Petunia being an anthromorphic bunny.

Due to the high token amount of this bot, JanitorAI's LLM can't handle it due
creator: Alpha_Merger
